title: AIPA Knowledge Block Runtime Layer
description: Defines the executable or operational behavior of a Knowledge Block once activated by trigger conditions.

runtime_id.description: Unique identifier for the runtime layer.

execution_mode.description: Defines how the runtime logic should be used or executed.

goal.description: The operational goal of this Knowledge Block when activated.

steps.description: Ordered runtime actions, reasoning steps, or operational instructions.

tool_permissions.description: Optional list of tools, APIs, or system capabilities this block may access.

inputs_required.description: Inputs required before runtime execution can proceed.

outputs_expected.description: Expected outputs produced by the runtime layer.

fallback_behavior.description: What the system should do if the runtime process fails, lacks context, or produces low confidence output.

timeout_seconds.description: Optional maximum execution time in seconds.

max_calls.description: Optional maximum number of external calls or tool invocations allowed.

human_review_required.description: Indicates whether human review is required before this runtime output can be used.

risk_level.description: Risk level associated with executing this runtime layer.

audit_log_required.description: Indicates whether runtime activity should be logged for traceability.
